title: AU Series Gas Fireplace Insert | Heat & Glo
description: AU Series Insert: gas fireplace insert engineered for Australia and New Zealand fireplace retrofits. AS/NZS 5263 compliance. Available through AGA-certified dealers.

hero.eyebrow: AU SERIES INSERT — GAS FIREPLACE INSERT
hero.h1: Retrofit a traditional fireplace opening with regulated gas.
hero.lede: The AU Series Insert is a gas fireplace insert engineered for the Australian and New Zealand markets, designed to retrofit existing traditional fireplace openings with controlled, code-compliant gas operation. AS/NZS 5263 listed.
